briefing.headline: Manning posted 3,472 yards and 29 TDs as a first-year starter — Heisman odds have him as the clear favorite heading into fall camp
briefing.context: Heisman betting odds: +250 — next closest QB sits at +400
briefing.text: Arch Manning enters the 2026 season as the consensus Heisman frontrunner after posting 3,472 passing yards and 29 touchdowns in his first full year as starter.

briefing.headline: Coleman enrolled in January and immediately won the WR1 job — staff expects him to open 2026 as the primary target opposite Wingo
briefing.context: Averaged 19.1 yards per catch at Auburn in 2024 · Already enrolled and practicing
briefing.text: Cam Coleman (WR, Auburn) is expected to be an immediate contributor after enrolling in January — staff views him as a plug-in starter opposite Ryan Wingo.

briefing.headline: Class sits at #8 nationally with 21 commits — staff is zeroing in on elite 2027 targets at EDGE and WR before the dead period
briefing.context: Top remaining '26 target: 5-star DT Jalen Thompson (Texas City) — decision expected before Aug. camp
briefing.text: Texas holds the #8 national ranking in the 2026 class with 21 commitments locked in — staff continues to monitor several elite 2027 targets at EDGE and WR.

briefing.headline: Texas opens SEC play Sep 6 vs. LSU in Austin — already tracking top-5 ticket demand on secondary market with 71 days out
briefing.context: DKR capacity 100,119 · Average resale now exceeds $240 per ticket
briefing.text: Texas opens SEC play Sept. 6 vs. LSU in Austin — the game is already generating top-5 ticket demand on the secondary market heading into summer.

briefing.headline: Arch Manning leads all college QBs in NIL valuation at ~$4.2M — the number climbs each week as fall camp approaches
briefing.context: No. 2 on the national NIL list overall · Nearest SEC QB sits at $2.1M
briefing.text: Arch Manning's NIL valuation sits at approximately $4.2M per On3 estimates, keeping him atop the national QB NIL market entering the 2026 season.

stories.headline: Arch Manning's Moment Has Finally Arrived
stories.summary: After two seasons learning behind Quinn Ewers, Arch Manning steps into 2026 as the unquestioned face of Texas football. Every indicator — arm talent, command of the offense, leadership — points to a special year.

stories.headline: Coleman Addition Makes Texas WR Room a Problem
stories.summary: Cam Coleman's arrival from Auburn gives Texas one of the deepest wide receiver groups in the SEC. With Wingo, Coleman, and Bishop all capable of No. 1 production, defensive coordinators have no good answer.

stories.headline: Colin Simmons Is the Best Pass Rusher in College Football
stories.summary: Simmons posted 11 sacks and 17 TFLs as a sophomore. At EDGE, he's already drawing Bednarik Award buzz and is the engine that drives Texas's defensive identity heading into SEC play.
